name: G-3 rule ID namespacing: --emit-id-locations reports where each rule id lives so renames preserve stability
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-id-locations 2>err.txt; grep -q 'g-ts-001' err.txt && grep -q 'google/g.yaml' err.txt && echo locations_emitted 1>&2
